subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Through divine grace and mercy thou hast attained the shore of the Most Great Ocean and art present before the Throne. This bounty [3.5s]... ...O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy name whereby Thou hast subdued the hearts of men, O Thou Well-Beloved, to grant that I be ever content
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بفضل و رحمت الهی بشاطی بحر اعظم وارد شدی و تلقاء عرش حاضر این فضل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
